title: Pharmacy
description: An NYC Health + Hospitals outpatient / retail pharmacy located at a facility. FHIR-aligned to a Location (with a pharmacy type). No Open Data twin and no open directory; refill workflows live inside MyChart. This schema is a directory record, not a prescription record (prescriptions are protected FHIR MedicationRequest data behind SMART auth).

services.description: Pharmacy services (e.g. refills, immunizations, specialty pharmacy, mail order).

refillViaMyChart.description: Whether refills can be requested through the MyChart patient portal.
